title: Section 33M
content: 1[33M. Cognizance of offences.--(1) No prosecution under this Chapter shall be instituted except by an Inspector 2[with the previous sanction of the authority specified under sub-section (4) of section 33G]. (2) No Court inferior to that 3[of a Metropolitan Magistrate or of a Judicial Magistrate of the first class] shall try an offence punishable under this Chapter.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 13 of 1964, s. 26 (w.e.f. 1-2-1969). 2. Ins. by Act 68 of 1982, s. 34 (w.e.f. 1-2-1983). 3. Subs. by s. 34, ibid., for "of a Presidency Magistrate or of a Magistrate of the first class" (w.e.f. 1-2-1983)
